attachments.text:
The most simplest program I ever used to <https://www.adviksoft.com/blog/gmail-to-pst/|export Gmail to PST> is with Adviik Gmail Backup Tool. This software allows you to export emails into 30+ formats. Unlimited email backup in pst file format. The software is available for FREE. Download and try it now.
